violations.text: Handwashing sink in men's restroom is lacking handwashing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black and pink residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.Unit take out of service to washed and sanitized.Ice voluntarily disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep counter shelves, hot hold units, cooking equipment ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

Outside refuse enclosure observed with an accumulation of trash, litter, and/or other debris.Refuse area must be cleaned and maintained as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

The floors and ceilings throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, grease buildup, and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
Handwashing signage is lacking in the men's restroom. A sign or poster notifying food employees to wash hands must be posted. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2024

The presence of rodents(droppings) and ants(live activity)is not controlled. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves in the kitchen have an accumulation of soil, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2024

The floors and floor drains throughout the kitchen(including under/behind equipment and 3 bay sink) and back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2024

The ceiling vents in the kitchen and walk in cooler area has an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 07/20/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of pink residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023

Ham was observed held at 52 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the fryalators, counters, etc. have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2023

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2023
